About Loan Tracker

A calm, private workspace for understanding your loans and planning your journey to becoming debt-free.

Application Details

App Name
Loan Khatam
Version
1.0.0
Release Date
June 2026
Developer
Loan Tracker Team
Website
This application
Support
support@loantracker.app

Purpose of Application

Loan Khatam exists to give individuals a clear, jargon-free picture of their borrowing. Loan statements are often dense and hard to reason about, which makes it difficult to know whether you are on track, how much interest you are really paying, or what a small change to your payments would actually achieve.

Loan Khatam turns those numbers into something you can explore and understand. It is built purely as an educational and personal financial planning tool — a private sandbox for asking "what if" questions about your own loans. It does not lend money, process payments, or replace professional advice; it simply helps you make more informed decisions with confidence.

How it works

Every feature is designed for educational and personal financial planning only.

EMI Calculation

Enter a loan's principal, interest rate and tenure and Loan Khatam computes the equated monthly instalment along with a full amortization schedule of principal and interest for every month.

Payoff Strategies

Compare repayment approaches such as the avalanche (highest interest first) and snowball (smallest balance first) methods to see which clears your debt faster or cheaper.

Prepayments

Model one-time or recurring extra payments to visualise how they shorten your tenure and reduce the total interest you pay over the life of a loan.

Interest Savings

Instantly see the interest you could avoid by paying more than the minimum, helping you weigh the trade-off between faster freedom and monthly cash flow.

Investment Comparison

Explore whether a surplus is better used to prepay a loan or to invest, using transparent, side-by-side estimates based on assumed returns you control.

Loan Closure Planning

Set a target closure date or budget and Loan Khatam maps out a clear, month-by-month plan so you always know where you stand on the road to being debt-free.
